    1. JavaTypeSource(JavaType)

Class JavaTypeSource

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.JavaTypeSource
Direct Known Subclasses:
JavaMemberSource
public class JavaTypeSource extends Object
A rich result object that represents the outcome of a source-finding operation for a JavaType. It handles both top-level and nested types by resolving the outermost type element.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected String
    content
    The full text content of the source file.
    protected final JavaType
    javaType
    The JavaType identity for which the source is being retrieved.
    protected final org.openide.filesystems.FileObject
    sourceFile
    The FileObject pointing to the found source file.

    JavaTypeSource(JavaType javaType)
    Constructs a new JavaTypeSource and attempts to find the source file for the given JavaType.

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaTypeSource

      public JavaTypeSource(JavaType javaType) throws Exception
      Constructs a new JavaTypeSource and attempts to find the source file for the given JavaType.
      Parameters:
      javaType - the type to find source for.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the source cannot be found or read.
